lyrics.text: I used to bite my tongue and hold my breath
lyrics.translation: 我曾经咬着舌头屏住呼吸

lyrics.text: Scared to rock the boat and make a mess
lyrics.translation: 害怕摇摇晃晃把船弄得一团糟

lyrics.text: So I sat quietly, agreed politely
lyrics.translation: 于是我静静地坐着，礼貌地表示同意。

lyrics.text: I guess that I forgot I had a choice
lyrics.translation: 我想我忘了我有选择

lyrics.text: I let you push me past the breaking point
lyrics.translation: 我让你把我推向崩溃的边缘

lyrics.text: I stood for nothing, so I fell for everything
lyrics.translation: 我什么都不主张，所以我什么都放弃了。

lyrics.text: You held me down, but I got up
lyrics.translation: 你阻止了我，但我站了起来

lyrics.text: Already brushing off the dust
lyrics.translation: 已经拂去灰尘

lyrics.text: You hear my voice, your hear that sound
lyrics.translation: 你听到我的声音，你听到的声音

lyrics.text: Like thunder, gonna shake your ground
lyrics.translation: 像雷声，震撼你的地面

lyrics.text: You held me down, but I got up
lyrics.translation: 你阻止了我，但我站了起来

lyrics.text: Get ready cause I've had enough
lyrics.translation: 准备好，因为我已经受够了

lyrics.text: I see it all, I see it now
lyrics.translation: 我明白了，我现在明白了

lyrics.text: I got the eye of the tiger, a fighter, dancing through the fire
lyrics.translation: 我得到了老虎的眼睛，成为一位斗士，浴火起舞

lyrics.text: Cause I am a champion and you're gonna hear me ROAR
lyrics.translation: 因为我是冠军，你会听到我咆哮

lyrics.text: Louder, louder than a lion
lyrics.translation: 比狮子更响亮

lyrics.text: Cause I am a champion and you're gonna hear me ROAR
lyrics.translation: 因为我是冠军，你会听到我咆哮

lyrics.text: Oh oh oh oh oh oh
lyrics.translation: 哦哦哦哦哦

lyrics.text: You're gonna hear me roar
lyrics.translation: 你会听到我的怒吼

lyrics.text: Now I'm floating like a butterfly
lyrics.translation: 现在我像蝴蝶一样飘飘然

lyrics.text: Stinging like a bee I earned my stripes
lyrics.translation: 像蜜蜂一样刺痛我的条纹

lyrics.text: I went from zero, to my own hero
lyrics.translation: 我从零变成了我自己的英雄

lyrics.text: You held me down, but I got up
lyrics.translation: 你阻止了我，但我站了起来

lyrics.translation: 已经拂去灰尘

lyrics.text: Roar-or, roar-or, roar-or
lyrics.translation: 咆哮，咆哮，咆哮

lyrics.text: I got the eye of the tiger, a fighter, dancing through the fire
lyrics.translation: 我得到了老虎的眼睛，一个斗士，在火中跳舞
